name: Vegetable Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely diced celery and carrot
1 1/2 cups short grain or Arborio rice
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and olive oil in a heavy wide saucepan over medium heat until foaming subsides.
2. Add the onion and cook for 5 minutes or until golden brown.
3. Add half of the celery and carrot, cooking for 3 to 4 minutes or until tender but still crisp.
4. Add the rice and cook, stirring continuously, for 5 minutes or until toasty.
5. Add the garlic and simmer for a few seconds.
6. Gradually add boiling water, one cup at a time, allowing each addition to be fully absorbed before adding more.
7. Continue this process until all 1 1/2 cups of water have been absorbed.
8. After 20 minutes or when the rice is half cooked, add the remaining celery and carrot, cooking for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Add the peas and finish cooking the rice by simmering until tender.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Stir in the Parmesan cheese and basil just before serving.
12. Garnish with toasted pine nuts (if using).
Yield: 4 servings
